data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Elements that are larger and closer to users are easier to click.
data.technical_spec: Design prioritizes larger, easily clickable buttons for main actions.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The time it takes to make a decision increases with the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Simplified interfaces to limit choices and reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive aesthetically pleasing designs to be more usable.
data.technical_spec: Focus on clean, visually appealing layout that enhances user experience.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users prefer interfaces that work similarly to those of frequently used applications.
data.technical_spec: Adopts familiar navigation patterns and controls.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects near each other are perceived to be related.
data.technical_spec: Groups related actions and elements to improve user understanding and navigation.
